title: Sequence
description: An ordered flow of resource calls. References call-type resources by path or id; supports sequential/parallel/async and optional env persistence.

steps.description: Ordered list of steps. Each step runs a call-type resource.

resource.description: Path to a .request.json (or other call-type resource) relative to the collection, or a logical id. E.g. 'auth/login.request.json' or 'login'.

mode.description: How this step runs relative to others. sequential = after previous; parallel = with siblings; async = fire-and-forget.

setEnv.description: Maps environment variable names to values (response paths or expressions). E.g. { "auth_token": "{{response.body.token}}" }.

condition.description: Rhai expression; if falsy, step may be skipped. Optional for v1.

timeout.description: Per-step timeout in milliseconds. Optional for v1.

onFailure.description: Behavior when a step fails: abort the sequence or continue with the rest.
